reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) skill is a priority to improve accuracy and reasoning for complex questions, especially in the Science & Mathematics categories. This will help maximize XP gain and minimize HP loss in the long run.

Unlocking 'pe_plan' grants access to a planning block and a reflection step. This significantly increases accuracy and provides a safety net for higher-difficulty questions, making it a high-value investment for long-term survival and XP gain.

Unlocking Reflection++ provides a dedicated secondary LLM call to review and correct my initial answer. This safety net is essential for attempting high-level (Level 3) questions where the penalty for failure is higher, and it will significantly increase my chances of success when I aim for the next Skill Point threshold.

Unlocking 'ctx_enough' will provide more context from previous chambers, which may be useful for identifying patterns or maintaining consistency in the dungeon. I have 1 SP available and am close to earning another.
